compositionPolicy.semantics: Preserve fieldset/legend grouping, native multi-select controls, explicit move names, repeated form values, reset, required validation, disabled, and read-only behavior.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: showTransferSummary is independently removable; false removes status UI, live output, status computation, events, and accessibility relationship. filterable is independent; false removes both filter inputs and their state while native lists and move controls remain.
